description: GO TO DEPENDING ON: WS-IDX=2 transfers control to second paragraph (PARA-B).
notes: GO TO PARA-A PARA-B PARA-C DEPENDING ON WS-IDX. Engine generates if/elif chain: idx=1->PARA-A, idx=2->PARA-B, idx=3->PARA-C. With WS-IDX=2, control goes to PARA-B which sets WS-RESULT='B'. Using PIC X (single char) to avoid padding issues.
